description: This file defines a TypeScript class 'Microservice' that constructs AWS resources such as DynamoDB tables and API Gateway endpoints, integrating Lambda functions for CRUD operations within a serverless architecture.

classes.name: Microservice
classes.description: A construct that sets up DynamoDB table, API Gateway resources, and Lambda functions for a microservice architecture.

methods.name: constructor
methods.description: Initializes the Microservice construct, creating DynamoDB table, API Gateway methods, and Lambda functions for CRUD operations.
